hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); CONTENT=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'console\.log'; then echo 'Warning: console.log statements should be removed before committing' >&2; exit 2; fi

hooks.description: Run npm audit when package.json changes
hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == "package.json" ]]; then echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|json|css|scss)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

hooks.description: Final type check and lint on changed files — silent on success
hooks.command: if [[ -f package.json ]]; then CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$'); if [[ -n "$CHANGED" ]]; then OUT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && npx eslint $CHANGED 2>&1); RC=$?; if [[ $RC -ne 0 || -n "$OUT" ]]; then echo "Quality check issues:" >&2; echo "$OUT" >&2; fi; fi; fi

hooks.description: Run unit tests for changed source files — silent on success
hooks.command: if [[ -f package.json ]]; then CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$' | grep -vE '\.(test|spec)\.'); if [[ -n "$CHANGED" ]]; then OUT=$(npx vitest run test/unit --passWithNoTests 2>&1); if echo "$OUT" | grep -qE 'FAIL|failed [1-9]'; then echo "$OUT" >&2; fi; fi; fi
